untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification (broadening top formation) and its geometric measurements (highest high, lowest low, height calculation) require candlestick pattern recognition beyond available price/technical indicators. The measure rule target calculation (Highest High + formation height) cannot be expressed as a simple indicator comparison. Chart pattern detection is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal requires visual pattern recognition of broadening top formation boundaries and multi-bar geometric analysis. Approximated entry as breakout above Donchian upper band (price exceeding recent highs). Exit condition is nominal due to inability to calculate pattern height. For proper implementation, a pattern detection module would be needed to identify formation extremes and calculate the height-based target: Target = formation_high + (formation_high - formation_low).
